Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Historical Planning publications collection, 1888-2002.
Collection Number: 15-3-3669

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Historical Planning publications collection, 1888-2002.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
15-3-3669
Abstract:
Historical planning publications, transferred from the Fine Arts Library.
Creator:
Cornell University. Fine Arts Library,
Quanitities:
69.8 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Historical planning publications, transferred from the Fine Arts Library, organized alphabetically by subject, outside of the subject "cities", the collection starts with the letter "H."
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As -

Historical Planning publications collection, #15-3-3669. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Subjects:
City planning
Building -- Research -- United States.
Architecture -- Study and teaching.
